Description

WELCOME TO GRAND CENTRAL 3 BY INTERGULF, A MODERN HIGH-RISE RESIDENCE IN THE HEART OF COQUITLAM CENTRE. THIS WELL-MAINTAINED, LIKE-NEW HOME OFFERS AN EXCEPTIONAL COMBINATION OF CONVENIENCE, NATURAL LIGHT, MOUNTAIN VIEWS, AND RESORT-STYLE AMENITIES.LOCATED JUST STEPS FROM COQUITLAM CENTRE, SKYTRAIN, DOUGLAS COLLEGE, TOWN CENTRE PARK, THE LIBRARY, AQUATIC CENTRE, RESTAURANTS, CAFÉS, AND EVERYDAY SERVICES, THIS IS AN IDEAL HOME FOR FIRST-TIME BUYERS, STUDENTS, PROFESSIONALS, OR INVESTORS.
